name: Crunchy Corn Bread Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chicken stock or Low-salt broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare corn bread according to package directions.
2. Cool completely; crumble (can be prepared up to 1 day ahead).
- Cover and let stand at room temperature.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F.
4. Place corn bread on a baking sheet. Bake until slightly dry, stirring occasionally, about 30 minutes.
5. Transfer corn bread to a large bowl.
6. Maintain oven temperature.
7. Grease a 13x9x2-inch glass baking dish.
8. Fry bacon pieces in a heavy large skillet over high heat until brown and crisp, about 8 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer bacon to the bowl with corn bread.
9. Add diced celery and all onions to the same skillet. Saute vegetables over high heat until just tender, about 12 minutes; add poultry seasoning and stir for one minute.
10. Scrape contents of skillet into the bowl with corn bread and toss to blend.
11. Season dressing with salt and pepper.
12. Mix in eggs, then chicken stock. Transfer to the prepared dish.
13. Cover dressing with aluminum foil (can be prepared up to 3 hours ahead; refrigerate).
14. Bake dressing covered for 30 minutes; uncover and bake until golden and crisp on top, about 30 minutes more.
15. Optional: Add about 2 dozen fresh oysters (or two 8-ounce jars, drained), cut into pieces if they are very large, just before baking.
